name: Validation & Merge
purpose: Cross-check products from multiple sources, validate against catalog, determine final products.
design_intent: Vote/tie-breaker logic isolated. Source attribution per-product. Fail-closed on validation errors.
change_impact: New merge logic replaces inline decision code in request-handler.ts.

types.stage1Output: Stage1Output from stage-classify-v1 — provides postType for comparison handling
types.stage2Output: Stage2Output from stage-noise-filter-v1 — provides Cheerio cleanProducts[] and signalScore
types.stage3Output: Stage3Output from stage-llm-extraction-v1 — provides LLM llmProducts[] (may be skipped=true)

required_fields: finalProducts - Array<{ name, duration?, price?, source, confidence }>
sourceAttribution - Array<{ productId, sources: string[], votes }>

priority_order: Cheerio (stage2.cleanProducts) - high confidence when both price AND duration present
LLM (stage3.llmProducts) - wins when catalog match + completeness >= 90%
Cheerio only (stage3 skipped) - use stage2.cleanProducts as sole source when LLM skipped

catalog_match.rule: All products must match known catalog

completeness.rule: Product should have BOTH price AND duration

price_per_month.rule: Compute price_per_month_krw when both price and duration present

duplicate_removal.rule: Remove duplicate products (same name, price, duration)

test_cases.name: Cheerio wins
test_cases.expected: finalProducts from stage1, sourceAttribution shows cheerio

test_cases.name: LLM wins
test_cases.input: stage2.cleanProducts: 1 product, stage3.llmProducts: 3 products with catalog match
test_cases.expected: finalProducts from stage3, sourceAttribution shows llm

test_cases.name: Mixed sources
test_cases.input: stage1 has price, stage3 has name

acceptance_criteria: Test cases TC-4.1 through TC-4.4 pass
